_source: India migration 2026-06-03 — Crypto universe for Indian exchanges
_note: Crypto trading in India via regulated exchanges (CoinDCX, WazirX, Binance India). SEBI has not yet formally regulated crypto; RBI's 2022 TDS (1% on transfers >₹10,000) applies. Tax: 30% flat on gains + 1% TDS. Max crypto exposure capped at 15% of equity per risk_policy.lock.
_min_30d_inr_volume_note: ₹100 crore (₹1 billion) 30-day INR volume. Filters to BTC/INR and ETH/INR at minimum.
_tds_note: Per Section 194S Income Tax Act: 1% TDS on crypto transfers >₹10,000 (₹50,000 for specified persons). Cost model must account for TDS as a transaction cost.
_tax_note: Capital gains on crypto taxed at flat 30% (Section 115BBH). Losses from crypto CANNOT be set off against other income. Cost model must track this separately.
_exchange_note: Primary exchanges: CoinDCX (https://coindcx.com), WazirX (https://wazirx.com). For production, wire a CoinDCX or WazirX adapter.
